\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID6013 introduces Number Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$(N-c);D2]=[N;D2]=[N;D1] Aromatic Azide Azide.Aliphatic [N;H0;$
\]
